productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Casual Brown Floater
description: Casual look, stylish touch - that's what these suede and nubuck sandals from red tape have to offer. Perfect for those casual days, these are all that you need to pamper your feet. Upper Suede midfoot and forefoot straps with velcro adjusters for easy wear, customised Fit, durability and comfort Wide backfoot strap to lock the foot in place, with perforations on the sides for maximum breathability Padded fabric inner for a comfortable wear and to prevent abrasion Stitch detailing on the upper for durability and style Brand name embossed on the midfoot strap for style Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Cushioned nubuck footbed with bumps for all-day massaged comfort Footbed stitched to the midsole for enhanced durability Outsole Durable rubber outsole with leaf midrib pattern lugs for maximum grip and traction on various surfaces Curved midfoot ergonomic comfort shoe careUse a suede brush to dust dirt off suede surfaceUse a nubuck brush to dust dirt off nubuck surfaceDo not store in direct sunlight
